name: iot-claw Control Plane
description: Operate an iot-claw control plane through native OpenClaw tools.

baseUrl.label: iot-claw Base URL
baseUrl.help: HTTP base URL for the iot-claw control plane, for example http://127.0.0.1:8080.

apiToken.label: API Token
apiToken.help: Optional Bearer token used for /api/plugin/* requests.

timeoutMs.label: Timeout Milliseconds
timeoutMs.help: HTTP timeout for each control-plane request.

defaultTenant.label: Default Tenant
defaultTenant.help: Optional default tenant used when a tool call does not pass one explicitly.

defaultSite.label: Default Site
defaultSite.help: Optional default site used when a tool call does not pass one explicitly.
